summary: Created package.json, tsconfig.json, .gitignore, and .vscodeignore with all required configuration for the claude-usage-tracker VS Code extension
Created esbuild.mjs at project root with two esbuild context builds: extension (CJS/node, external vscode) and webview (IIFE/browser). Supports --watch flag via context.watch().

Created src/types.ts exporting the UsageEntry interface with all required fields (timestamp, sessionId, cwd, model, inputTokens, outputTokens, cacheCreationTokens, cacheReadTokens). No logic, just the interface.

Created src/usageParser.ts with walkDir helper (recursive JSONL file finder using readdirSync/withFileTypes) and parseUsageData function that reads ~/.claude/projects/, parses assistant entries, and returns a flat UsageEntry array. Returns [] if base dir doesn't exist.
